props.ChoiceText: The work exposed something hidden enough to change your life, if you could keep hold of it.
props.ChoiceBio: Unearthing a fortune changed the meaning of labor in a single violent instant.

0.TransitionText: Because unearthing a fortune changed the meaning of labor in a single violent instant, labor carried you onto another hard road.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because unearthing a fortune changed the meaning of labor in a single violent instant, hard work could not keep you fed, and you crossed into crime.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: Someone remembers where the fortune was found and who first laid hands on it.
